text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 102 

The two rightmost digits (fifth and sixth characters) are the result of service code: 
00 = Not Specified 
1A = Filled As Is, False Positive 
1B = Filled Prescription As Is 
1C = Filled, With Different Dose 
1D = Filled, With Different Directions 
1E = Filled, With Different Drug 
1F = Filled, With Different Quantity 
1G = Filled, With Prescriber Approval 
1H = Brand-to-Generic
